summary: Plan and evaluate a telehealth implementation including platform selection, workflow design, regulatory compliance, and patient access.

inputs.name: clinical_requirements
inputs.description: Visit types, clinical workflows, and care delivery requirements.

inputs.name: platform_options
inputs.description: Available telehealth platforms and their capabilities.

inputs.name: regulatory_constraints
inputs.description: HIPAA, licensure, prescribing, and reimbursement requirements.

inputs.name: patient_population
inputs.description: Patient demographics, access barriers, and technology availability.

inputs.name: ehr_integration_needs
inputs.description: Required EHR integrations and data exchange needs.

outputs.name: platform_assessment
outputs.description: Evaluation of platform options against clinical and regulatory requirements.

outputs.name: implementation_plan
outputs.description: Phased implementation plan with milestones, training, and go-live support.

outputs.name: workflow_design
outputs.description: Clinical and operational workflows for telehealth visits.

outputs.name: compliance_assessment
outputs.description: HIPAA, licensure, and reimbursement compliance verification.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is telehealth implementation, not general IT or video conferencing.
Require clinical requirements and platform options before assessment.
Verify HIPAA compliance for all platform recommendations.
Output must include platform assessment, implementation plan, and compliance verification.

steps.action: Define clinical requirements, visit types, and care delivery models.
Evaluate telehealth platforms against clinical and technical requirements.
Verify HIPAA compliance, BAA status, and licensure requirements.
Design clinical and operational workflows for telehealth visits.
Assess patient access barriers including broadband, devices, and digital literacy.
Create phased implementation plan with training and go-live support.

success_criteria: HIPAA compliance verified with Business Associate Agreement in place.
Multi-state licensure requirements addressed for all practice states.
Patient access barriers assessed with mitigation strategies.
Clinical workflows documented for each visit type.
Implementation plan includes provider training and go-live support.

rollback.when: If HIPAA compliance cannot be verified for selected platform, halt and reassess options.
